title: Promote repo-structure-sync as repo init and template adaptation skill
description: Update the repo-structure-sync skill spec and references so copied AI context frameworks use it as the first skill after being placed in an existing or empty target repository.
validation: Updated repo-structure-sync canonical spec to include repo init triggers and target repository mode classification.
Updated scan, migration boundary, document target, and output contract references for empty, existing, and copied-template repos.
Updated human-facing repo-structure-sync guide with repo init guidance and README targets.
Synced current and Claude wrapper descriptions.
